Package com.github.siroshun09.event4j.listener

Interface Listener<T extends Event>

  • Type Parameters:
    T - the event type
    Functional Interface:
    This is a functional interface and can therefore be used as the assignment target for a lambda expression or method reference.
    @FunctionalInterface
public interface Listener<T extends Event>
    An interface to receive and process events.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Default Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void handle​(T event)
      The method to receive events.
      default void handleException​(T event, @NotNull Throwable throwable)
      The method to be called when an exception is thrown in handle(Event).

    • Method Detail

      • handle

        void handle​(@NotNull
            T event)
        The method to receive events.

        If an exception is thrown while calling this method, handleException(Event, Throwable) will be called.

        Parameters:
        event - the event

      • handleException

        default void handleException​(@NotNull
                             T event,
                             @NotNull
                             @NotNull Throwable throwable)
        The method to be called when an exception is thrown in handle(Event).

        This method does nothing by default.

        Parameters:
        event - the event
        throwable - the exception that caused
